topics.title: Miss USA Clips and American Idol Discussion
topics.summary: The show features a series of clips from the Miss USA pageant, followed by a discussion regarding high school experiences, local scandals involving teachers, and recent performances on American Idol.

topics.title: American Idol Contestant Sanjaya Binns
topics.summary: The show features a heated discussion regarding the popularity of contestant Sanjaya Binns and the impact of organized voting efforts on the competition's integrity.

topics.title: American Idol and Sanjaya Voting Campaign
topics.summary: The studio features a heated discussion regarding the "Vote for the Worst" campaign to make contestant Sanjaya win American Idol, while also addressing listener interactions and promotional tactics.

topics.title: Telemarketing Scams and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including a confusing telemarketing call regarding household items, reports on local events like a new bakery cupcake, and updates on celebrity appearances and personal lives.

topics.title: Pronunciation Betting Game
topics.summary: The studio participants place bets on whether a celebrity can correctly pronounce various names, including those of actresses and athletes.

topics.title: Guest Appearance and Musical Performance
topics.summary: The studio hosts a guest who performs comedy bits and discusses the musical proficiency of a Beatles tribute band.

topics.title: Miss Black Howard Stern Pageant
topics.summary: The studio hosts a beauty pageant to crown the winner of the Miss Black Howard Stern title, featuring a panel of judges and various contestants.

topics.title: Miss Black Howard Stern Pageant
topics.summary: The show features two contestants competing in the Miss Black Howard Stern pageant, where they perform talents and answer questions regarding their personal lives, careers, and views on social issues.

topics.title: Contestants Compete for Miss Black Howard Stern
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition where several women perform talents and answer personal questions to be crowned the winner.

topics.title: Miss Black Howard Stern Contest
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition where contestants are judged on personality and performance to determine the winner of the Miss Black Howard Stern title.

topics.title: Jodie Gibson's Prison Experience
topics.summary: The studio hosts Jodie "Baby Dog" Gibson, a former escort service owner who details her time in a maximum-security prison where she faced physical violence and medical procedures.

topics.title: Prostitution and Prison Experiences
topics.summary: The studio explores the experiences of a former high-profile escort who details her time in prison, her interactions with celebrity clients like Bruce Willis and Ben Affleck, and the specifics of her illicit business operations.

topics.title: Former Escort Shares Hollywood Secrets
topics.summary: The show features an interview with former escort Jody Baby Doll Gibson regarding her book and experiences with high-profile clientele.

topics.title: Current Events and Media News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including upcoming guests for the Superfan Roundtable, technological trends in wireless communication, the transition to digital television signals, medical news regarding circumcision and preventative mastectomies, and various celebrity updates involving American Idol and reality television.

topics.title: Legal Battles and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of news segments including a custody dispute involving children left in a car, the paternity case of Anna Nicole Smith’s daughter, updates on Iraq troop withdrawals, international tensions between Britain and Iran, and local reports on pet food recalls and plastic bag bans.
